name: Spicy White Pizza
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Separate dough into 10 biscuits. Separate each biscuit into 2 layers. Place in ungreased 12-inch pizza pan or 13x9-inch pan; press over bottom and 1/2-inch up sides to form crust. In small bowl, combine oil, garlic, oregano, basil and red pepper flakes; mix well. Drizzle over crust. Sprinkle with cheeses. Bake for 18-22 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
